metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_3985
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 2F shows immunogold labeling in the vicinity of an inhibitory axon terminal onto neuronal soma documenting Neurocan as component of the perisynaptic extracellular matrix.

Fig2G shows specificity of the neurocan antibody where COS7 cells were transfected to express neurocan fused to alkaline phosphatase (Neurocan-AP), or alkaline phosphatase (AP) alone. Only cells expressing Neurocan-AP were positive for labeling. The AP transfected cells and control lacking primary antibody showed no signal, indicating specificity of the antibody.. Experimental description: C57BL/6 WT mice were anesthetized and perfused transcardially with phosphate bufered saline (PBS). p. 12
